product: AI Search supports selected text columns, sorting, and aggregations (Beta) ​
tagline: June 8, 2026 AI Search now supports query time options for full text and hybrid queries in Beta.
what_it_does: June 8, 2026 AI Search now supports query time options for full text and hybrid queries in Beta. You can limit keyword matching to selected text columns, sort results by columns indexed for sorting, and return aggregate counts for values and ranges.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 8, 2026 AI
capabilities.desc: June 8, 2026 AI Search now supports query time options for full text and hybrid queries in Beta.
